name: Kritika Verma
title: Full Stack Developer | React.js + Spring Boot
tagline: Building production-ready web apps with React.js, Spring Boot & PostgreSQL
about: I'm a Full Stack Developer with 9+ months of production experience building and deploying web applications using React.js, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL. I've worked across the full stack — designing REST APIs, implementing JWT authentication with Spring Security, managing relational databases, and deploying applications on AWS (EC2/S3) and Vercel. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code with attention to performance, security, and user experience. I've reduced CRM page load time by 25% through lazy loading and optimized API calls, and built AI-integrated platforms with third-party API workflows. I enjoy taking ownership of features end-to-end — from database schema design to frontend UI — and delivering production-ready results.
bio: I enjoy breaking complex problems into clean, reusable components and maintaining readable, well-structured codebases. My workflow spans REST API design, database schema planning, frontend state management, and cloud deployment. I take ownership of features end-to-end and continuously build projects that solve real problems.

responsibilities: Built and deployed responsive client-facing web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for live production products.
Participated in requirement gathering and technical discussions with cross-functional teams during the development lifecycle.
Diagnosed and resolved production bugs across frontend and backend, ensuring smooth performance across platforms.
Managed website deployments and hosting updates on AWS (EC2/S3), ensuring stable production releases.
Used Git and GitHub for version control, handling feature updates, fixes, and collaborative changes.
Developed Adam Exports CRM using React.js and Redux Toolkit, reducing page load time by 25% through lazy loading and optimized API calls.
Built dynamic forms with validation using React Hook Form and Formik, improving user experience and minimizing input errors.
Integrated REST APIs using Axios and implemented interactive dashboards, modals, and data tables with filtering, sorting, and search functionality.
Participated in code reviews and followed clean code practices; tested and debugged API integrations using Postman and Browser DevTools.

projects.title: Expense Tracker — Full Stack Finance Management App
highlights: Built full-stack web app with React 19 + Spring Boot 3 REST backend with PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, Spring Security BCrypt hashing, and protected routes via React Context + Axios interceptors.
Implemented three-tier spending alerts with per-category limits (SAFE/WARNING/EXCEEDED), Recharts analytics dashboard, paginated CRUD table, and CSV export via OpenCSV.
Achieved multi-user data isolation via per-user JPA query scoping — all data scoped per user with zero leakage between accounts.

projects.title: Imaginai — AI Image Generation Platform
highlights: Built end-to-end AI platform where Express.js backend receives user prompts, calls a third-party AI API, and returns generated images to the frontend.
Managed async/await workflows, structured error handling, and environment-secured API keys for production safety.
Built production-ready UI with loading states and error fallbacks for timeouts and invalid inputs, deployed on Vercel with Vite build and SPA routing.

projects.title: World Tour Map
highlights: Built an interactive map application using React and Leaflet.js to visualize and manage visited locations.
Implemented custom markers, popups, and responsive layouts to support different screen sizes.
Managed client-side state for map interactions and UI updates.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard
highlights: Developed a dashboard-style interface with reusable components and structured layouts.
Implemented navigation, cards, and data display components commonly used in real admin panels.
Focused on layout consistency, responsiveness, and component reuse.
